CREATE TABLE test_schema.test_table (id INT, name STRING, age INT);
COPY BINARY INTO test_schema.test_table FROM 'data_file_1.bin' ON SERVER;
COPY BINARY INTO test_schema.test_table (id, name) FROM 'data_file_2.bin' ON SERVER;
COPY BINARY INTO test_schema.test_table FROM 'data_file_3.bin', 'data_file_4.bin' ON CLIENT;
INSERT INTO test_schema.test_table SELECT * FROM (SELECT id, name, age FROM another_table WHERE age > 30) AS subquery;
COPY BINARY INTO test_schema.test_table (age) FROM (SELECT MAX(age) FROM another_table) ON SERVER;
COPY BINARY INTO test_schema.test_table FROM 'large_data_file.bin' ON SERVER;
CREATE TABLE another_table (id INT, name STRING, age INT);
COPY BINARY INTO another_table FROM 'another_data_file.bin' ON SERVER;
COPY BINARY INTO test_schema.test_table FROM 'data_file_5.bin' ON CLIENT WHERE age >= 18;
